title: Shadowed Path (Ghost of Tsushima)
description: Experience Incredible Visuals and Enhanced Gameplay. What Path will you follow?
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Kec5OyQfHUg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**_Shadowed Path_** is a Minecraft modpack that immerses you in a dark, atmospheric journey through a world of myth, danger, and breathtaking beauty. Inspired by the challenging combat of souls-like games and the rich storytelling of Black Myth: Wukong and Ghost of Tsushima, this modpack transforms Minecraft into a hauntingly epic adventure.

**Key Features:**

_Epic Fight Mod:_ Experience intense, skill-based combat that redefines Minecraft’s fighting mechanics. Every swing, dodge, and parry feels visceral and rewarding, bringing souls-like combat to your blocky world.

_Distant Horizons:_ Explore a vast, seamless world with stunning draw distances. The horizon stretches endlessly, inviting you to uncover its secrets and dangers.

_Epic Terrain Mod:_ Traverse awe-inspiring landscapes, from towering mountains and deep, shadowy valleys to lush, otherworldly biomes. The terrain generation is more immersive and dramatic than ever, perfect for a mythic journey.

**_I would also reccomend dedicating more memory ram in the settings somewhere around 6000mb to 8000mb._**

**_Shaders:_**
- Bliss

**_Resource Packs:_**
- Patrix 32x
You can upscale the resolution on his patreon. 32x is the only free version availabe.

**_Mods:_**
_Gameplay:_
- Epic Fight mod
- [Forge]SLU
- Darkest Souls
- Leawind third person
- Sophisticated Backpack
- Soulslike Weaponry
- Weapons Master YDM
- Weapons of Miracle

_Visuals:_
- Embeddium
- Better Foliage
- Continuity
- CustomSkin Loader
- Dynamic Trees
- Entitiy Model Feature
- Entity Texture Feature
- Falling leaves
- Oculus
- Visuality

_Sounds:_
- Sound physics remastered
- Ambient Sounds
- Ambient Additions
- Presence Footsteps
- Sounds

_World Generation:_
- Distant Horizons
- Chunky
- Epic Terrain

Supportive:
- YetAnotherConfigMod
- Animatic Reforged
- Attribute Fix
- Cloth Config
- Collective
- Connector
- CreativeCore
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Geckolib
- Iceberg
- MRU
- Polytone
- Portacore
- Prism
- Projectile Damage
- Radium
- Rebidium
- Sophisticated Core

**The Journey:**
Follow the Shadowed Path and carve your legend in a world where every decision matters. Will you rise as a hero, or will the darkness consume you? The path is yours to forge, but beware—what lies ahead is not for the faint of heart.

**Are you ready to walk the Shadowed Path?**
